original_image_tags: A technical plot within a rectangular border. The plot title or legend area at the top left contains "Atlas IIAS" and "Mode 5 P_I". A legend indicates two contour lines: a dashed line labeled "10⁻⁵" and a dotted line labeled "10⁻⁶". The plot shows two nested, asymmetrical, roughly elliptical contour shapes centered near the origin (0,0), extending primarily in the positive downrange direction.

elements.description: A graph titled 'Figure 18. Atlas IIAS Mode-5 Ship-Hit Contours with A = 3.45'. The chart plots 'Crossrange Distance (nm)' on the y-axis (ranging from -15 to 15) against 'Downrange Distance (nm)' on the x-axis (ranging from -5 to 25). It contains a legend for 'Atlas IIAS' showing two dashed lines representing '10^-5' and '10^-6' probability levels, as well as a 'Mode 5 PI' label. Two nested dashed oval contours are plotted around the center (0,0). Additional text inside the chart reads 'B = 1,000' and 'A = 3.45'.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the main visual elements: a graph titled 'Atlas IIAS' with two nested contour shapes, a legend for '10^-5' and '10^-6', and axes for crossrange/downrange distance, but they differ on some quoted text and additional internal labels.
